items.reasoning: Sustain through Laser + Arcane Bolt spam; both heroes harass relentlessly in lane.
Emergency recovery after Laser blinds + Ancient Seal into Bolt combo.
Ember needs CS under Laser blind debuff; last-hitting is critical for bottle timing.
+2 damage helps last hit under pressure; instant heal survives kill attempts.
Power rune control refills HP/mana against heavy nuke spam. Ember's rune control is strong with Fire Remnant.
Dodge Rocket + position out of Arcane Bolt range. Mobility before fights.
Skywrath Bolt spam + Tinker Laser/Rocket = 6-10 wand charges per fight.
Farm accelerator; chain lightning clears waves that March of Machines pushes. Enables split-pushing.
Self-cyclone dodges Mystic Flare's 2.4s channel. Purges Ancient Seal silence. Mana regen for SoF.
Fire Remnant charges become unlimited escape and chase. SoF + Chains range increased.
Armor + AoE slow counters both nukers. Active reveals Tinker blinking in trees.
25% cooldown reduction on all spells; Remnant + SoF + Chains on 4.5s rotation.
If Ancient Seal + Mystic Flare one-shots through positioning, BKB is mandatory.
Blocks Laser targeting; gives mana regen for constant Remnant usage.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Survive the nuke-heavy lane with Bottle and Wand, contest runes with Fire Remnant. Eul's is the key mid-game item -- dodge Mystic Flare and purge Ancient Seal silence. Late game, Ember's mobility with Aghs outpaces both nukers who need to stand still to deal damage.
